description: Create a reusable GitHub Actions workflow named FBGEMM GPU/GenAI/HSTU CUDA Test that tests and optionally publishes CUDA wheels for FBGEMM GPU/GenAI/HSTU. The workflow takes several inputs, including a matrix configuration, container settings, repository reference, and PyTorch channel version. It sets up a build environment, installs dependencies, and runs tests or benchmarks on GPU instances. If specified, it also publishes the artifact to PyPI.
